items.title: At least six Americans exposed to Ebola during DR Congo outbreak
items.dek: One of the six Americans believed to have been exposed is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports.
items.body: One of the six Americans believed to have been exposed is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli forces boarding Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus, activists say
items.dek: Live broadcasts from the Global Sumud flotilla show commandos boarding several boats trying to breach the Gaza maritime blockade.
items.body: Live broadcasts from the Global Sumud flotilla show commandos boarding several boats trying to breach the Gaza maritime blockade.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Strike over high fuel prices paralyses transport in Kenya
items.dek: Key roads have remained largely empty and some schools have asked students to stay at home.
items.body: Key roads have remained largely empty and some schools have asked students to stay at home.
items.author: IriLine Desk
